oneOf.title: No Issue
oneOf.description: Receiver of the documents sends the message just to update the status and there are no problems with document processing.

oneOf.title: References Incorrect
oneOf.description: Received document did not contain references as required by the receiver for correctly routing the document for approval or processing.

oneOf.title: Legal information incorrect
oneOf.description: Information in the received document is not according to legal requirements.

oneOf.title: Receiver unknown
oneOf.description: The party to which the document is addressed is not known.

oneOf.title: Delivery issues
oneOf.description: Delivery proposed or provided is not acceptable.

oneOf.title: Prices incorrect
oneOf.description: Prices not according to previous expectation.

oneOf.title: Quantity incorrect
oneOf.description: Quantity not according to previous expectation.

oneOf.title: Items incorrect
oneOf.description: Items not according to previous expectation.

oneOf.title: Payment terms incorrect
oneOf.description: Payment terms not according to previous expectation.

oneOf.title: Finance incorrect
oneOf.description: Finance terms not according to previous expectation.

oneOf.title: Partially paid
oneOf.description: Payment is partially but not fully paid.

oneOf.title: Other
oneOf.description: Reason for status is not defined by code.

description.title: Description
description.description:
Description contains a simple text that describes the reason why the
original document was not processed.

faults.title: Faults
faults.description:
Faults provides more specific details about what cause the document
to be rejected.

ext.title: Extensions
ext.description: Extensions for local or format focussed data

bill.Reason.description: Reason helps the recipient of a message determine why they are receiving it.
